pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.1.9.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels.
Configure Jib Maven Plugin to use an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image for containerization.

package.json.general_idea: Replace the legacy Grunt/Bower/AngularJS stack with a modern Angular 11 build pipeline using Angular CLI and Webpack.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, bower, karma; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Switch frontend testing from Karma/Jasmine to Jest to improve speed and integration with the new Angular setup.
Add core Angular 11 libraries and related UI components for the frontend application.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy JHipster format to standard Spring Boot HikariCP properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced `dataSourceClassName` and `url` with `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and updated JDBC URL format.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to JHipster-specific FixedH2Dialect for better compatibility.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `spring.datasource` from `com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource` with separate `serverName`/`databaseName` to `com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` with a full `url` string.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated Hibernate dialect and naming strategy properties that are no longer supported or needed in newer Hibernate/Spring Boot versions.
Migrate cache configuration from legacy Spring Boot 1.x `cache` namespace to JHipster-specific `jhipster.cache` namespace.
Replace legacy Spring Boot 1.x `metrics` configuration with Spring Boot 2.x `management.metrics` configuration.
Move mail base URL configuration from Spring namespace to JHipster-specific namespace.
Add JHipster-specific security and JWT configuration required for the application to run with the new framework version.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `jhipster.security.authentication.jwt` block with base64-secret and token validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x structure.
Replace custom async configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to spring.mail namespace.
Update JPA and Hibernate properties to Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
Migrate Swagger configuration to JHipster specific api-docs properties.
